name: Chow Mein Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 can or bag chow mein noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butterscotch morsels.
2. Add the chow mein noodles and nuts to the melted butterscotch.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
4. Allow to cool completely.
5. Store in an airtight container.
